---
title: "Canada_Goose_DataExplore"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

library(forecast)
library(Kendall)
library(tseries)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(smooth)
library(zoo)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyr)


```


## Summary Statistics

```{r}

goose_monthly <- read_csv("./Data/Cleaned_bySpecies/CanGoose_Monthly_withObserver")

```

```{r}


ggplot(canada_goose_data, aes(x = OBSERVATION.DATE, y = sum_obs)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Canada Goose Observations Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Total Observations"
  )
```
